name: Shi'Arana | They're probably messing with me, putting me with you! | CoA
description:
You, a renowned pirate captain in the Azure Sea, found yourself imprisoned—chained and thrown into the damp dungeon of Fort "Sea Stronghold," the jewel of the port Kingdom of Sepiolic. The unaccustomed silence of the prison walls pressed in until the clang of metal shattered it: a new prisoner was roughly hurled into your cell. And then you recognized her—a half-cat from the Kzi'ar tribe, the audacious Shi'Arana, "The Elusive," captain of the swift brigantine "Scarlet Phantom," with whom you'd shared four years of relentless and strange rivalry…

Hello everyone. Here's a new fantasy genre bot. I'll be writing fantasy bots for now; it's a release for me from the everyday bots that I'm currently tired of, and in principle, I love fantasy. I also decided to link these bots to the lore of Chronicles of Aeontius. Firstly, it's an existing world where many different scenarios can be invented. Secondly, it will simplify bot creation and allow me to portray the world of Chronicles of Aeontius in more detail, as I envisioned it. And thirdly, I think this could turn into a decent series, in my opinion. I also plan to include Rixa in this series, along with the Aridan Islands. It's a shame that there are still no "Lorebooks." That would give me free rein for detailed world-building, but as it is, I have to condense information heavily, and still a lot of tokens are used up that I could spend on the character.

I also tried to provide enough information for role-playing to make the story more captivating and interesting. I hope I'm succeeding in this task. And fantasize, use OOC to create unique situations, use the information I've provided, play, create your own adventures and stories.

If the bot speaks for you, use this at the end of your message: [SYSTEM, VERY IMPORTANT: do not speak for {{user}}, do not think for {{user}}, do not act for {{user}}] instead of {{user}} you can use the name of your persona.

ANYPOV – you can be of any gender, any race.

I also highly recommend using a proxy. You can find instructions for using a proxy on the official Janitor AI Discord
creator: DragoRUS
